name: Lemon-Oatmeal Crispies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix the oats, honey, and salt in a bowl.
3. Add the chopped nuts if using.
4. Stir in the lemon juice until well combined.
5. Spread the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Remove from oven and let cool completely before serving.
